cover.alt: Master of the Heavenly Yard — cover

description: The eighth and final volume of the Deadly Sins of Evil — the finale that gathers every cycle, vessel, and demon onto the same stage. Source uses a deliberate inversion: Chapter 1 is named "Epilogue". Hunt for the Deadly Sins, the Princess setting out, the Heroes, the BLACKBOX, the truths of Re_Birthday and the Pure Evil all converge on a single boy's choice. Master of the Heavenly Yard is the synthesis the entire chronicle has been spiralling toward.
